cards.bil.title: Decentral
cards.bil.description: Decentral is revolutionizing the payment process for creators, influencers, agencies, and production companies in Brazil.
cards.propeller.title: Propeller
cards.propeller.description: Deposit ETH or tBTC and earn leveraged staking yield. Propeller loops your collateral automatically and self-deleverages to avoid liquidation. Exit any time via the async withdrawal queue.
cards.hollarBonds.title: HOLLAR Bonds
cards.hollarBonds.description: Lock stablecoins and earn fixed APR. Fixed Yield HOLLAR Bonds have no liquidation risk for users, as the protocol covers the underlying yield and liquidation risk.
bonds.deposit.soldOut.description: Unfortunately, the current batch of bonds sold out. Keep an eye out for next updates on our channels.
